creator: gbe@FreeBSD.org
text:
On stable/13 the extra tcp stacks RACK and BBR are quite outdated. This also applies to the TCP HPTS congestion control module, which is needed for BBR.

It would be good if the sources could be kept in sync with freebsd/main. The extra TCP stacks are not enabled by default, but users who would like to experiment with them could do this on stable/13 and don't have move to -CURRENT to do so.
